description: Maps raw category strings (as ingested per-country) to the canonical category name defined in etf-analysis-categories.json. Used to normalize country-specific taxonomies (Stock-Analysis style, GICS sector labels, etc.) into the shared Morningstar-style analysis grouping. Aliases are global (country-agnostic): a given raw label is assumed to mean the same thing wherever it appears. Categories that do NOT have a meaningful canonical equivalent are NOT aliased here — instead they are added as first-class entries in etf-analysis-categories.json so they appear as their own card.
